name: Rhubarb-Maple Toasted Bread Pudding
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 325°F.
2. Whisk together the eggs, maple syrup, sugar, and salt in a bowl.
3. Remove crusts from bread slices and toast until lightly golden.
4. Tear toasted bread into small cubes and place in a greased casserole dish.
5. Stir in the remaining butter, then pour over the bread cubes so they are well coated with milk mixture.
6. Sprinkle chopped rhubarb on top of the bread mixture.
7. Bake for 40 minutes until golden brown and set.
8. Serve warm with maple-flavored whipped cream.
